Products

All UPS Systems PDUs Power Distribution Server Racks Cooling Solutions

UPS 3000VA Online Double-Conversion

High-performance online UPS for critical IT infrastructure with rack-mount design.

UPS 6000VA Tower UPS

Tower-form UPS with extended runtime capability for mid-size data centers.

UPS 10kVA Rackmount

Enterprise-grade rackmount UPS with hot-swappable batteries.

UPS 1500VA Line-Interactive

Compact line-interactive UPS for workstations and network equipment.

UPS 20kVA Modular

Scalable modular UPS system with N+1 redundancy support.

Basic PDU 8-Way

Cost-effective 8-outlet power distribution unit for standard racks.

Metered PDU 16-Way

16-outlet metered PDU with per-outlet current monitoring.

Switched PDU 24-Way

24-outlet switched PDU with remote on/off control via SNMP/HTTP.

Intelligent PDU 32-Way

32-outlet intelligent PDU with environmental monitoring sensors.

Vertical PDU 6-Way

Zero-U vertical mount PDU for maximizing rack outlet density.

Power Distribution Panel 125A

125A main breaker distribution panel for data center power zones.

Power Distribution Panel 200A

200A distribution panel with multiple branch circuits for high-density racks.
